prompt: Replace the sign in the first image with the second image. Then, add the car from the third image onto the road, and add a cow falling from the sky above the car. Add blur to the cow and car to show their motion. The cow shoule be upside down while falling.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the existing orange diamond-shaped road sign on the left side of the road with the yellow warning sign provided in image 2. Introduce the tan SUV from image 3 onto the road in image 1, positioning it in the mid-ground, further along the visible road segment past the initial curve. Directly above this newly placed SUV, add a cow falling from the sky, ensuring the cow is oriented upside down. Apply motion blur to both the falling cow and the SUV to illustrate their motion.
objects: orange diamond-shaped road sign (should not be present)
yellow warning sign on the left side of the road
tan SUV on the road in the mid-ground
upside-down cow falling from the sky above the SUV
motion blur on the SUV and falling cow
